engineGuide.h2: Honda Vezel Engine Codes - Full Technical Specifications & Replacement Guide
engineGuide.h3: Every engine code fitted to the Honda Vezel across all generations, with technical specs, compatible variants and trims, known failure points, and average rebuilt prices from UK specialists. Select any engine code to compare quotes.

entries.title: 1.5L Petrol
entries.history: The L15B 1.5L i-VTEC replaced older 1.5L units, bringing improved efficiency and 131hp output across Vezel/HR-V range.
compatibleVariants: RU1 L15B 2WD, RU2 L15B 4WD, UK HR-V L15B, JDM Import L15B
commonFailures: Timing chain stretch at higher mileage (80k+ miles)
CVT transmission judder on early 2013-2016 models
Reduced power after aftermarket ECU tuning/chip tuning
entries.cta: Get quotes for L15B Honda Vezel engine replacement

entries.title: 1.5L Petrol
entries.history: Variant designation of L15B used in select markets 2015-2022, mechanically identical to standard L15B.
compatibleVariants: RU1 L15B3, RU2 L15B3, UK HR-V L15B3
commonFailures: Timing chain tensioner wear on higher-mileage units
Oil dilution concerns on short-journey driving patterns
entries.cta: Get quotes for L15B3 Honda Vezel engine replacement

entries.title: 1.5L Petrol Turbo
entries.history: Turbocharged L15B introduced in 2019 facelift, delivering 172-177hp for enhanced performance in Modulo X and late-model Vezel.
compatibleVariants: Modulo X L15BT, Facelift RU1 L15BT, Facelift RU2 L15BT
commonFailures: Oil dilution from direct injection on short trips
Turbocharger oil seal leaks at higher mileage
Carbon buildup on intake valves (GDI engines)
entries.cta: Get quotes for L15BT Honda Vezel engine replacement

entries.title: 1.5L Petrol Turbo
entries.history: Chinese-market variant of L15BT with 177hp output, occasionally found in UK imports requiring specialist matching.
compatibleVariants: Chinese Import L15BW, Select JDM Import L15BW
entries.cta: Get quotes for L15BW Honda Vezel engine replacement

entries.title: 1.5L Hybrid
entries.history: Honda's i-MMD hybrid system pairing 1.5L Atkinson-cycle engine with electric motor for exceptional efficiency in Vezel/HR-V.
compatibleVariants: RU3 LEB-H1 Hybrid 2WD, RU4 LEB-H1 Hybrid 4WD, UK HR-V Hybrid
commonFailures: Electric water pump failure (no auxiliary belt system)

entries.title: hybrid battery degradation after 80k-100k miles
entries.cta: Get quotes for LEB-H1 Honda Vezel engine replacement

entries.title: 1.5L Hybrid Facelift
entries.history: Updated LEB-H1 variant for 2019+ facelift models with refined hybrid control software and improved thermal management.
compatibleVariants: Facelift RU3 LEB-H2, Facelift RU4 LEB-H2
entries.cta: Get quotes for LEB-H2 Honda Vezel engine replacement

entries.title: 1.6L Diesel
entries.history: Honda's 1.6L i-DTEC diesel developed for European markets, fitted exclusively to UK HR-V models for strong torque and economy.
compatibleVariants: UK HR-V N16A1 Diesel, European Market HR-V N16A1
commonFailures: DPF regeneration failures on short-journey driving
EGR valve clogging and cooler faults
Injector seal leaks causing fuel dilution
entries.cta: Get quotes for N16A1 Honda Vezel engine replacement

commonProblems.h2: Honda Vezel Engine Problems - What It Costs to Fix & When Replacement Makes Sense

problems.h4: Timing Chain Stretch - Why Honda Vezel L15B Engines Fail Prematurely
problems.affectedModels: Honda Vezel RU1, RU2, UK HR-V (2013-2021, L15B & L15B3 petrol engines)
problems.rootCause: Timing chain tensioner wear combined with oil quality issues leads to chain slack, causing rattling noise and potential valve timing errors.

repairOptions.tier: Minor - Preventative Chain Replacement - Replace chain, tensioner, guides before failure
repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Remove timing cover, replace chain assembly, reset timing
repairOptions.longevity: Viable if caught early before rattling; prevents catastrophic damage

repairOptions.tier: Intermediate - Chain + Oil Pump Service - Full timing service with oil pump inspection
repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Chain replacement plus oil pump chain inspection, full gasket set
repairOptions.longevity: Recommended for engines showing early wear signs; extends life significantly

repairOptions.tier: Full Replacement - Rebuilt / Reconditioned Engine - Supply & fit rebuilt L15B unit
repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Remove failed engine, install rebuilt unit with upgraded tensioner, bench tested
repairOptions.longevity: Best value when engine has suffered damage; includes 12-month warranty

problems.recommendation: On a Honda Vezel worth £8,000-£15,000, preventative chain replacement at 70k miles offers better value than waiting for failure. If rattling is already present, compare rebuilt engine quotes - the cost difference is often smaller than expected.
problems.cta: Compare rebuilt L15B engine prices for your Honda Vezel

problems.h4: Hybrid Battery Degradation - Why Honda Vezel LEB-H1 Systems Lose Power
problems.affectedModels: Honda Vezel RU3, RU4, UK HR-V Hybrid (2013-2021, LEB-H1 & LEB-H2 hybrid engines)
problems.rootCause: Lithium-ion hybrid battery cells degrade with age and heat exposure, reducing electric assist and triggering IMA warning lights.

repairOptions.tier: Minor - Battery Reconditioning - Cell balancing and software reset
repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Diagnostic scan, cell balancing procedure, hybrid system reset
repairOptions.longevity: Temporary fix for early degradation; may buy 12-24 months

repairOptions.tier: Intermediate - Hybrid Battery Module Replacement - Replace degraded battery section
repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Remove battery pack, replace faulty module(s), recalibrate system
repairOptions.longevity: Cost-effective for moderate degradation; restores most hybrid function

repairOptions.tier: Full Replacement - Rebuilt Hybrid Powertrain - Supply & fit rebuilt LEB-H1 with new battery
repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Complete hybrid system replacement with upgraded battery, full warranty
repairOptions.longevity: Best long-term solution for high-mileage hybrids; includes electric motor

problems.recommendation: For Vezel hybrids under 100k miles, module replacement often restores performance at sensible cost. Above 120k miles, a rebuilt hybrid powertrain with warranty typically offers better value than repeated repairs.
problems.cta: Get quotes for LEB-H1 Honda Vezel hybrid engine replacement

problems.h4: ECU Tuning Limp Mode - Why Honda Vezel Engines Lose Power After Chip Tuning
problems.affectedModels: Honda Vezel RU1, RU2, Modulo X (2013-2022, L15B, L15BT turbo petrol engines)
problems.rootCause: Aftermarket ECU remaps or chip tuning alter fuel/ignition maps beyond factory tolerances, triggering fault codes and limp mode protection.

repairOptions.tier: Minor - ECU Reset & Diagnostic - Clear fault codes, restore factory map
repairOptions.whatItInvolves: OBD diagnostic scan, clear codes, revert to stock ECU calibration
repairOptions.longevity: Only works if no permanent damage; tuning must be fully reversed

repairOptions.tier: Intermediate - ECU Repair/Replacement - Fix or replace damaged ECU unit
repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Remove ECU, repair circuitry or fit refurbished unit, reprogram
repairOptions.longevity: Required if tuning caused electrical damage to ECU components

repairOptions.tier: Full Replacement - Rebuilt Engine with Stock ECU - Supply & fit rebuilt L15B/L15BT
repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Install rebuilt engine with factory-spec ECU, full system calibration
repairOptions.longevity: Only option if tuning caused mechanical damage (pistons, turbo, valves)

problems.recommendation: If limp mode appeared immediately after tuning, start with ECU reset. If mechanical symptoms accompany the warning (knocking, smoke, loss of compression), compare rebuilt engine quotes - tuning damage is rarely covered by warranty.
problems.cta: Compare rebuilt L15BT turbo engine prices for your Honda Vezel

problems.h4: Electric Water Pump Failure - Why Honda Vezel Hybrid Engines Overheat
problems.affectedModels: Honda Vezel RU3, RU4, UK HR-V Hybrid (2013-2021, LEB-H1 & LEB-H2 hybrid engines)
problems.rootCause: LEB-H1 hybrid engines use an electric water pump (no belt drive) for efficiency; pump motor or controller failures cause coolant circulation loss.

repairOptions.tier: Minor - Pump Replacement - Replace electric water pump unit only
repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Drain coolant, remove failed pump, install new unit, bleed system
repairOptions.longevity: Effective if caught before overheating damage occurs

repairOptions.tier: Intermediate - Pump + Controller Service - Replace pump and control module
repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Pump replacement plus hybrid cooling system controller inspection/replacement
repairOptions.longevity: Recommended if warning lights appeared before failure

repairOptions.tier: Full Replacement - Rebuilt Hybrid Engine - Supply & fit rebuilt LEB-H1 unit
repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Complete engine replacement if overheating caused head gasket or block damage
repairOptions.longevity: Only option if pump failure led to catastrophic overheating damage

problems.recommendation: Electric pump failure is often detectable via hybrid system warnings before complete failure. At first sign of cooling issues, get the pump checked - prevention is far cheaper than engine replacement.
problems.cta: Enquire about LEB-H1 Honda Vezel hybrid engine availability

problems.h4: CVT Transmission Issues - Why Honda Vezel Automatics Develop Judder
problems.affectedModels: Honda Vezel RU1, RU2, UK HR-V (2013-2018, L15B petrol engines with CVT)
problems.rootCause: CVT belt wear and fluid degradation cause shuddering during acceleration; ignored, this leads to transmission failure requiring engine removal.

repairOptions.tier: Minor - CVT Fluid Service - Drain, flush and refill with Honda HCF-2 fluid
repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Remove old fluid, flush system, refill with correct specification fluid
repairOptions.longevity: Preventative maintenance; recommended every 40k miles for CVT longevity

repairOptions.tier: Intermediate - CVT Valve Body Repair - Repair or replace transmission control unit
repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Remove transmission, service valve body, replace solenoids, recalibrate
repairOptions.longevity: Addresses judder caused by hydraulic control issues; avoids full rebuild

repairOptions.tier: Full Replacement - Rebuilt Engine with CVT - Supply & fit rebuilt L15B with CVT
repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Complete powertrain replacement if CVT failure damaged engine mounts or components
repairOptions.longevity: Best value when transmission failure has caused secondary engine damage

problems.recommendation: CVT judder is often reversible with fluid service if addressed early. If shuddering persists after fluid change, get a transmission specialist assessment before considering engine replacement.
problems.cta: Compare rebuilt L15B CVT-compatible engine prices for your Honda Vezel

finalCta.h4: Don't Let Engine Failure Write Off Your Honda Vezel
finalCta.paragraph: Whether you're dealing with L15B timing chain concerns, LEB-H1 hybrid battery issues, or ECU tuning complications, EngineMarket makes it simple to compare prices from trusted UK Honda Vezel specialists. Every rebuilt engine includes upgraded components addressing the original failure point, plus nationwide delivery and a minimum 12‑month unlimited mileage warranty. Compare prices today and get back on the road without the main dealer premium.
finalCta.buttonText: Compare Honda Vezel Engine Replacement Prices Now →
finalCta.disclaimer: All prices are indicative UK market ranges based on historical quote data and repair requests from our network of engine specialists. Dealer pricing is estimated based on published main dealer labour rates and genuine OEM parts pricing. Specialist pricing reflects actual quote data from EngineMarket's UK network. Actual costs vary depending on damage severity, vehicle condition, variant, and workshop location within the UK. Use our free comparison tool to get tailored quotes for your specific Honda Vezel and engine code. Every engine supplied through EngineMarket carries a minimum 12‑month unlimited mileage warranty - always confirm exact terms with your chosen supplier.

engineSizes.h2: Honda Vezel Engines by Size - Find the Right Displacement for Your Variant

items.title: Honda Vezel 1.5L Petrol Engines
items.description: The 1.5L i-VTEC petrol engine powered the first-generation Honda Vezel from launch in 2013, offering a balance of efficiency and 131hp output across RU1 (2WD) and RU2 (4WD) chassis variants.
commonFailurePoints: Timing chain stretch on higher-mileage units; oil dilution on turbo L15BT variants; reduced power after aftermarket ECU tuning
items.cta: Compare Honda Vezel 1.5L petrol engine prices

items.title: Honda Vezel 1.5L Hybrid Engines
items.description: Honda's 1.5L Atkinson-cycle hybrid system paired with electric motor assist delivered exceptional fuel economy in RU3 (2WD) and RU4 (4WD) Vezel variants, with combined output of 132hp plus 29.5hp electric assist.
commonFailurePoints: Electric water pump failure (no belt drive); IMA hybrid battery degradation after 90k miles; inverter cooling system faults
items.cta: Enquire about Honda Vezel 1.5L hybrid engine availability

items.title: Honda Vezel 1.6L Diesel Engines
items.description: The 1.6L i-DTEC diesel engine was fitted exclusively to UK and European market HR-V models (not JDM Vezel), offering strong torque and motorway economy for high-mileage drivers. commonFailurePoints: DPF regeneration failures on short-journey driving; EGR valve
cooler clogging; injector seal leaks causing fuel dilution

engineYears.h2: Honda Vezel Engines by Year - What Was Fitted & When
engineYears.intro: This section covers all major engine changes across the Honda Vezel/HR-V production timeline, organised so owners can quickly identify their engine and compare rebuilt engine prices from UK specialists.

years.description: The Honda Vezel launched in Japan with the new L15B petrol and LEB-H1 hybrid powertrains on the RU1-RU4 chassis platform.
keyChanges: Honda Vezel introduced in Japan (JDM) on new compact SUV platform
L15B 1.5L i-VTEC petrol engine debuted (131hp) for RU1 (2WD) and RU2 (4WD)
LEB-H1 hybrid system launched for RU3 (2WD) and RU4 (4WD) variants
CVT automatic standard; manual transmission rare
knownFor: Strong initial demand for hybrid efficiency in compact SUV segment
Early CVT judder reports on some 2013-2014 units
JDM import market to UK begins growing
years.cta: Get quotes for 2013 Honda Vezel replacement engines
years.ticker: Honda Vezel RU1 engine replacement • Honda Vezel L15B timing chain • Honda Vezel hybrid battery cost

years.description: The Honda HR-V launched in the UK in 2015, sharing the Vezel platform but with UK-specific emissions equipment and the addition of the N16A1 diesel engine.
keyChanges: Honda HR-V officially launched in UK market (2015)
N16A1 1.6L i-DTEC diesel engine added for European/UK models only
L15B and LEB-H1 engines continued with minor calibration updates
Facelift preparation began for 2019 model year
popularModels: Honda Vezel RU3 LEB-H1 Hybrid (JDM import)
knownFor: UK HR-V gains popularity for practicality and hybrid efficiency
N16A1 diesel praised for motorway economy but DPF concerns on short trips
L15B timing chain wear begins appearing on higher-mileage early units
years.ticker: Honda HR-V diesel engine cost • Honda Vezel LEB-H1 hybrid repair • Honda Vezel RU2 4WD engine

years.description: The 2019 facelift introduced turbocharged L15BT/L15BW engines alongside updated LEB-H2 hybrid systems for enhanced performance and refinement.
keyChanges: Honda Vezel facelift launched with updated styling and interior
LEB-H2 hybrid variant launched with refined thermal management
Modulo X performance trim introduced with turbo engine
popularModels: Honda Vezel Facelift RU3/RU4 LEB-H2 Hybrid
knownFor: Turbo variants deliver strong performance but oil dilution concerns on short trips
LEB-H2 hybrid shows improved reliability over early LEB-H1 units
JDM import demand increases for facelift turbo models
years.cta: Get quotes for 2019 Honda Vezel turbo engine replacement
years.ticker: Honda Vezel L15BT turbo cost • Honda Vezel Modulo X engine • Honda Vezel facelift hybrid price

years.description: The second-generation Honda Vezel/HR-V launched on a new platform with updated powertrains, marking the end of first-generation RU1-RU4 engine availability.
keyChanges: Second-generation Honda Vezel/HR-V launched on new global platform
New e:HEV hybrid system replaces LEB-H1/L2 in many markets
UK market focuses on second-gen HR-V with updated emissions compliance
mainEngines: Continued support for first-gen L15B/LEB-H1/N16A1 via aftermarket
knownFor: First-gen RU1-RU4 engines remain popular in UK import market
Replacement demand for L15B and LEB-H1 continues strong
Specialist suppliers focus on JDM import support
years.cta: Enquire about Honda Vezel first-generation engine availability

faq.h2: Honda Vezel Engine Replacement - Frequently Asked Questions

items.question: How much does it cost to replace a Honda Vezel engine in the UK?
items.answer: Honda Vezel engine replacement costs typically range from £1,800-£4,800 for rebuilt units, depending on engine code (L15B petrol, LEB-H1 hybrid, or N16A1 diesel), variant, and whether supply-only or supply & fit is selected.
keyPoints: L15B petrol rebuilt: £1,800-£3,200 supply only
LEB-H1 hybrid rebuilt: £2,400-£4,200 supply only
N16A1 diesel rebuilt: £2,100-£3,800 supply only
Supply & fit adds £450-£850 to engine price
All rebuilt engines include minimum 12-month warranty
items.cta: Compare rebuilt Honda Vezel engine prices for your variant

items.question: What is the difference between Honda Vezel and Honda HR-V engines?
items.answer: Honda Vezel and HR-V share identical engines (L15B petrol, LEB-H1 hybrid), but Vezel is the JDM import name while HR-V is the official UK market nameplate; diesel N16A1 is UK/EU only.
keyPoints: Vezel = JDM import name; HR-V = UK official name
L15B petrol and LEB-H1 hybrid engines are identical across both
N16A1 1.6L diesel fitted to UK HR-V only, not JDM Vezel
ECU calibrations may differ between JDM and UK-spec units
Chassis codes RU1-RU4 apply to both nameplates
items.cta: Get quotes for Honda Vezel or HR-V engine replacement

items.question: Which Honda Vezel engine is most reliable for replacement?
items.answer: The naturally aspirated L15B 1.5L petrol engine offers the best balance of reliability, parts availability and affordable replacement cost for Honda Vezel owners seeking long-term dependability.
keyPoints: L15B petrol has proven reliability with proper maintenance
Timing chain service recommended at 70k-80k miles preventative
LEB-H1 hybrid efficient but battery replacement adds cost long-term
N16A1 diesel reliable for high-mileage but DPF issues on short trips
Turbo L15BT powerful but oil dilution concerns require monitoring
items.cta: Compare Honda Vezel L15B petrol engine replacement options

items.question: What causes reduced engine power warnings on Honda Vezel after tuning?
items.answer: Aftermarket ECU remaps or chip tuning on Honda Vezel L15B/L15BT engines can trigger fault codes and limp mode by exceeding factory fuel/ignition tolerances, requiring ECU reset or repair.
keyPoints: Tuning alters maps beyond Honda's safety parameters
ECU detects anomalies and activates limp mode protection
Reverting to stock calibration often resolves warning
Mechanical damage from aggressive tuning may require engine replacement
Always use Honda-specialist tuners familiar with L15B architecture
items.cta: Get quotes for Honda Vezel L15B engine replacement if damaged

items.question: How do I identify my Honda Vezel chassis code (RU1/RU2/RU3/RU4)?
items.answer: Your Honda Vezel chassis code is stamped on the VIN plate (driver's door jamb or firewall) and determines drivetrain: RU1/RU2 = petrol (2WD/4WD), RU3/RU4 = hybrid (2WD/4WD).
keyPoints: Check VIN plate on driver's door jamb or firewall
RU1 = L15B petrol 2WD; RU2 = L15B petrol 4WD
RU3 = LEB-H1 hybrid 2WD; RU4 = LEB-H1 hybrid 4WD
Chassis code critical for correct engine and drivetrain matching
Enter registration above for instant chassis identification
items.cta: Find Honda Vezel engine compatible with your chassis code

items.question: Can I replace a Honda Vezel hybrid engine with a petrol engine?
items.answer: Swapping a Honda Vezel LEB-H1 hybrid engine for an L15B petrol unit is not recommended due to incompatible ECU, wiring harness, hybrid battery integration and drivetrain control systems.
keyPoints: Hybrid and petrol ECUs use different communication protocols
Wiring harnesses and sensor arrays are not interchangeable
Hybrid battery, inverter and electric motor integration complex
4WD hybrid variants have additional driveline components
Always replace like-for-like engine code for reliable operation
items.cta: Enquire about Honda Vezel LEB-H1 hybrid engine replacement

items.question: How long does a Honda Vezel engine replacement take in the UK?
items.answer: Honda Vezel engine replacement typically takes 1-3 days for supply-only dispatch, plus 1-2 days fitting time at your chosen garage; hybrid variants may require certified technician scheduling.
keyPoints: Supply-only engines dispatch within 24-72 hours from UK stock
Fitting time: 1 day petrol, 1.5-2 days hybrid (specialist certification)
Nationwide delivery available; collection from supplier possible
Pre-book garage slot to minimise vehicle downtime
Hybrid systems require post-fit calibration and road test
items.cta: Find Honda Vezel engine supply & fit deals near you

items.question: Is it worth repairing or replacing a failed Honda Vezel engine?
items.answer: For Honda Vezel engines with catastrophic failure (seized, broken timing chain), replacement with a rebuilt unit is usually more cost-effective than major repair, especially with warranty coverage.
keyPoints: Rebuilt engines include upgraded components addressing known failures
12-month warranty on rebuilt units vs limited repair guarantee
Labour costs for major repair often approach replacement cost
Consider vehicle value: replacement sensible if Vezel worth £5k+
Get multiple quotes before deciding on repair vs replace
items.cta: Compare Honda Vezel rebuilt engine prices vs repair costs

items.question: What does the Honda Vezel 12-month engine warranty cover?
items.answer: The minimum 12-month unlimited mileage warranty on Honda Vezel rebuilt engines covers manufacturing defects and component failure under normal use, excluding damage from misuse, neglect or improper installation.
keyPoints: Covers internal components: pistons, bearings, seals, gaskets
Unlimited mileage - no distance restriction during warranty period
Excludes damage from incorrect fitting, oil starvation or tuning
Warranty valid UK-wide; claim via supplying specialist
Always retain installation invoice and service records for claims
